title: Refactor: Migrate to microservices architecture
original_text: Refactored monolithic application to microservices. Split application into independent services. Implemented service discovery with Consul. Added API gateway for routing. Implemented inter-service communication with gRPC. Added distributed tracing with Jaeger. Result: microservices architecture deployed.
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(arch): migrate to microservices architecture"
